subject: Saving your team time on consultations
body:
Hi,

I was looking at TWJ Law's website and noticed consultation requests come through a standard contact form. That means someone on your team manually schedules every initial call.

We help law firms set up automated consultation booking, where potential clients pick a time that works, get a confirmation and reminder, and your team's calendar stays organized without the back-and-forth.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
